name: Jasmine Crockett
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $86,112 for Jasmine Crockett in U.S. House, TX-30. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
